name: mcp-readiness
description: Lighthouse for MCP servers — grade any public Model Context Protocol server against 10 spec-bound readiness criteria (handshake, tool quality, safety annotations, anti-ghost content, token efficiency, honest errors) + a Claude/ChatGPT directory pre-flight, plus a Gold Rush v1 handoff mode that drives SaSame's public MCP (package/visibility/report). Zero deps, runs anywhere with npx.
author: SaSame MCP Observatory
